translate.team_supporting_text:
Discover the minds behind the Libelit platform and unravel the story of how they brought it to life. Join us and be part of an exciting journey towards innovation!

Join our exclusive investment community and be the first to seize new opportunities.
Subscribe now to stay connected with our team.
translate.subheading1: Our Team values collaboration and mutual respect which allows us establish strong partnerships.
translate.subheading2: Since the beginning of our work on Libelit, we have been working tirelessly to create an inclusive and diverse platform with an international team that provides most innovative solutions for real estate investment worldwide.We are committed to creating a positive impact in the industry and delivering value to our users.
translate.cta_text: Stay up-to-date with the latest developments on Libelit by subscribing or joining our social media channels. You'll receive updates about new projects, specialists, and investment opportunities that can help you grow your capital. As a subscriber, you'll also have access to exclusive investing knowledge that's not available anywhere else for free.
translate.banner_heading: Construction lending shouldn’t be this hard
translate.banner_supporting_text: Libelit streamlines loan application, drawdowns, and asset lifecycle management for lenders and developers.
translate.banner_dev_supporting_text: Join an existing or build your own team of professionals to participate in global development.
translate.what_we_do_subheading: What is it that we do?
translate.what_we_do_heading: We provide the opportunity to invest in the global real estate market
translate.what_we_do_dev_heading: We help to execute real estate development projects
translate.what_we_do_supporting_text: Discover the unique features of investing with the Libelit platform.
translate.what_we_do_dev_supporting_text: We have created a social platform that connects development project specialists, investors, marketing resources, and professional know-how.
translate.community_supporting_text:
With Libelit, you have the option to create your own team of experts or join an existing project.

Each specialist has their own profile, which provides information about their education, experience, and portfolio of completed investments.

You can choose from a vast pool of industry experts and select the ones that you believe are the best fit for your project.
translate.tools_heading: All the necessary tools and information.
translate.tools_supporting_text: Welcome to the perfect place for creating unique development projects around the world. The platform provides a database of free expert knowledge that can introduce you to the world of real estate. With the help of Libelit, you can implement top-class architectural projects using advanced design, planning, and marketing tools.
translate.possibilities_heading: We can finance your construction project
translate.possibilities_supporting_text:
Are you working on an exciting development project but struggling to secure the necessary funding? Look no further!
We can provide you with a comprehensive database of private investors who are willing to allocate funds to help bring your project to life.
With their support, you can turn your vision into a reality and create unique development opportunities all around the world.
translate.what_we_offer_supporting_text: Here are the most important functions of the platform, divided into those that are already active and those that are in progress.
translate.inv_tool_3: Investing into s primary and secondary market
translate.elearn_desc: Elevate your investment and real estate development skills to new heights with our comprehensive knowledge base and courses.
translate.land_list_desc: Curated Selection of Building Plots for Your Investment Needs
translate.social_media_platform_desc: eLearningBuild your network of the specialists, share your experience and learn from others.
translate.sim_real_state_2: Templates necessary to obtain a building permit
translate.sim_real_state_3: Assistance in setting up legal structure
translate.project_present_page_1: Description and technical specifications of projects
translate.project_present_page_2: Valuation of costs and sales estimate
translate.project_present_page_3: Virtual reality walk, project gallery and live camera
translate.project_present_page_5: Users review of projects and teams behind them
translate.user_profile_portfolio_desc: A database of specialists from all over the world - architects, construction engineers, general contractors, lawyers, 3D designers and many others.
translate.time_left_to_launch: Time left to the Libelit Platform launch
translate.are_you_interested_supporting_text: Stay up-to-date with the latest developments on Libelit by subscribing or joining our social media channels. You'll receive updates about new projects, specialists, and investment opportunities that can help you grow your capital. As a subscriber, you'll also have access to exclusive investing knowledge that's not available anywhere else for free.
translate.like_to_learn: Would you like to learn how you can start investing in real estate?
translate.section_for_investors: Go to the section for investors
translate.support_next_project:
Are you a real estate developer?
Would you like to find out how we can support your next project?
translate.goto_section_for_developers: Go to the section for developers
translate.trustworthy_supporting_text: You can access expert-approved projects, review detailed business plans, and track construction progress in real-time through live camera.
translate.investment_supporting_text: Start building your real estate portfolio today with just 50 USD. Our platform makes it simple and accessible for anyone to invest and achieve their financial goals.
translate.diversify_supporting_text: To reduce risk and maximize your return, you can invest with your cryptocurrency in multiple real estate projects simultaneously.
translate.better_design_supporting_text:
By investing in our platform, you're supporting sustainable architecture and advocating for good design. We work with the best specialists to ensure that all projects we support bring improvements to our societies.
At Libelit, we firmly believe that by improving architecture, we can enhance and improve the quality of life for everyone.
translate.blockchain_supporting_text:
We are pioneers in real estate investment using blockchain technology, enabling the purchase of fractional ownership through project tokenization.
This approach makes investing more accessible and offers potential returns without high entry barriers. Additionally, it democratizes real estate investment, inviting a broader range of investors to participate in the market.
translate.faq_subheading: Find answers to your questions in our FAQ
translate.faq_supporting_text: Get familiar with our collection of the most important issues concerning Libelit. If you still have questions, Contact us.
translate.choose_topic: Choose a topic to explore our tips.
translate.roadmap_description: Libelit is a start-up project and it’s evolving everyday. This roadmap is a general guide showing what our team has achieved already and what we are planning in the future. It may be changed at any time to meet the users and investors needs.
translate.construction_finance_1: The use of blockchain technology for the tokenization of projects.
translate.construction_finance_3: Invest in both the primary and secondary markets.
translate.investing_tools_knowledge_supporting_tex: Keep reading to discover the most significant features of the platform.
translate.roadmap_heading_1: What have we accomplished so far?
translate.roadmap_supporting_text_1:
We began developing the platform in April 2022, conducting market research and consulting with professional entities to identify the needs of our target audience. We then underwent thorough legal preparations, which laid a solid foundation for our work in 2023.

At the start of 2023, we assembled our team and took the first formal steps by registering companies in Poland and Australia. In the second quarter, we initiated the initial work on the platform, which has been gaining momentum every month.
translate.roadmap_supporting_description_1: We will be attending Token 2049 in Dubai, as well as other global events. Additionally, we have planned social media development, advertising campaigns, and the launch of an NFT collection in Q3 2024.
translate.roadmap_supporting_description_2: The Libelit payment token is set to be released in Q1 2024. The Libelit platform will launch in Q2 2024, with full implementation and improvements by October 2024.
